## Summary

Describe the documentation, example report, or site change.

## Scope

- [ ] Static site content only
- [ ] Example report artifacts updated
- [ ] Repository metadata or GitHub configuration updated
- [ ] Links to flow repositories or versions changed

## Checks

- [ ] `node scripts/check-links.js`
- [ ] Local browser preview
- [ ] English/Chinese content checked where applicable

## Notes

Mention any known limitations, skipped checks, or large generated files.
